title: Salty Russian Grapes Bake
description: A nostalgic Russian-inspired dessert featuring crispy grape skins with a salty, sweet glaze. Perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: grapes
ingredients.notes: Use small red or green grapes for best texture

ingredients.name: almond flour
ingredients.notes: Optional for texture; skip for nut-free

instructions: Wash grapes thoroughly and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix honey, cinnamon, and salt until combined.
Toss grapes gently in the honey-cinnamon-salt mixture until evenly coated.
Spread grapes in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until skins are crisp and golden.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
